name: University of Bath
notes: Verified UCAS 2026 exact title match; 4-year MMath Mathematics with Year in Industry; Bath is UK's top university for industrial placement; Dyson, AstraZeneca and GCHQ regularly host placements; highest-paid maths graduates in UK

name: University of Surrey
notes: Verified UCAS 2026 exact title match; 4-year BSc/MMath Mathematics with Professional Training; Surrey's Professional Training year is mandatory and rated Outstanding; strong links to Rolls-Royce, NHS and financial sector

name: University of Southampton
notes: Verified UCAS 2026 exact title match; 4-year MMath Mathematics with Industrial Year; Lloyd's and financial sector placement hosts; strong actuarial and OR employers; Southampton maths-industry links are excellent
